name: SimpleZarrPlateProcessor
description: OME-ZARR plate processor: applies Sobel edge detection to every channel/plane, with optional Gaussian pre-smoothing, max-projection along Z, and per-channel contrast normalization

inputs.name: Pre-smoothing sigma
inputs.description: Sigma for Gaussian pre-smoothing applied before Sobel edge detection. Reduces noise. Set 0 to skip.

inputs.name: Max projection
inputs.description: Perform maximum intensity projection along Z axis

inputs.name: Normalize contrast
inputs.description: Stretch each channel to full dtype range using 2nd-98th percentile clipping. Makes the processing effect clearly visible.

inputs.name: Parallel workers
inputs.description: Maximum number of parallel worker threads for processing multiple plates
